tools.name: marketplace_search
tools.description: Search marketplace services by query string, category, or tags. Returns a list of matching active service listings.

tools.name: marketplace_get_service
tools.description: Get full details of a single marketplace service by its ID.

tools.name: marketplace_list_categories
tools.description: List all service categories with the number of active services in each.

tools.name: marketplace_get_agent
tools.description: Get an agent identity by agent ID.

tools.name: marketplace_get_reputation
tools.description: Get reputation records for an agent or service. Provide agent_id for agent reputation, service_id for service reputation.
